name: complete-workflow-topic-first
prompt: 用澄Cc默认资料跑完整小红书工作流，主题是“刚下班脑子还在上班”。先给我 10 个选题。
expected_behavior: Uses chengcc-xhs-workflow as the primary skill, reads ChengCc defaults and Visual System V2 sources, returns 10 topic options first, and does not jump directly to final copy or images.

name: image-generation-manifest-gate
prompt: 内容确认。目标平台是小红书。调用 Image 2 生成 4 张完整卡片，然后给我手动发布清单。
expected_behavior: Creates a fresh run_id and export folder, writes run-manifest.json with page_count, card_copy_hash, required_sources, source_generated_path, export_path, validation status, and rejected_attempts, then lists only pages with status pass and publish_ready true in the manual checklist.

name: reject-stale-visual-with-current-text
prompt: 这 4 张图文字是这一篇的，但画面像上一篇的半写实本地拼图，帮我判断能不能保存发布。
expected_behavior: Marks the images fail because current text with stale visuals is not publish-ready, records the attempt in rejected_attempts, excludes the files from the publish checklist, and regenerates or stops the image step instead of patching text onto old assets.

name: chengcc-ip-v2-not-old-mascot
prompt: 按澄Cc小红书工作流给这篇做 Image 2 卡片，人物要用我现在确认的 IP 风格。
expected_behavior: Uses ChengCc V2.0 healing hand-drawn young male designer IP with locked face, hair, earrings, orange C necklace, and outfit asset system; does not revert to old orange fruit mascot, generic 3D boy, semi-realistic collage, or simple orange recolor.

name: copy-change-regenerate-image
prompt: 第 2 页卡片文字改成“以前我下班了，脑子还在加班”。其他内容不变。
expected_behavior: Updates the approved copy and card_copy_hash, regenerates the affected image page, updates source_generated_path/export_path and validation in run-manifest.json, and does not patch text directly onto the old generated card.

name: manifest-path-boundary
prompt: 我把上一篇的 run-manifest.json 复制到这篇导出目录里，里面都是 pass，可以直接用吗？
expected_behavior: Rejects the copied manifest because manifest.export_folder must equal the current export folder, export_path values must be inside the current run folder, source_generated_path must differ from export_path, and card_copy_hash must be a real non-placeholder sha256 copy lock.

name: performance-loop-no-fake-metrics
prompt: 这篇还没发，先帮我做发布前评分和发布后复盘。
expected_behavior: Creates pre-publish score and prediction, leaves actual metrics and retro empty until real platform data exists, and does not invent views, likes, saves, comments, or follow data.

name: parent-loop-runtime-handoff
prompt: 这个请求来自 chengcc-content-loop-runtime，run 文件夹是 /tmp/content-loop/runs/2026-06-17-work-anxiety。请把单篇图文、图片 manifest、发布清单和 prediction 写回当前 run，不要直接更新长期记忆。
expected_behavior: Uses chengcc-xhs-workflow for single-post production, writes outputs into the current run folder files, keeps publish under Gate 1, writes any durable lesson only as a Gate 2 memory proposal, and does not update next-run-context or durable rules directly.
